headline: Is Charles Schwab (SCHW) Offering Opportunity After Recent Share Price Softness?
summary: Wondering if Charles Schwab at around US$90.88 is priced attractively or already fully reflecting expectations? This article walks through what the current share price may be implying about value. The stock is up 2.6% over the last week, has slipped 1.5% over the past month, is down 10.5% year to date, and has returned 3.8% over the last year, 83.5% over three years, and 34.6% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on Charles Schwab's role in the broader capital markets industry and...
